option.name: originalContent
option.value:
from __future__ import annotations
import sys from importlib import util from pathlib import Path from types import ModuleType
GUI_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parent PROJECT_DIR = GUI_DIR.parent
# Primary expected locations (clean layout) CLIENT_SIDE_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / "zed" / "task1" / "client_side" JETSON_SIDE_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / "zed" / "task1" / "jetson_side"
# Legacy/uppercase layout used by older commits LEGACY_CLIENT_SIDE_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / "zed" / "TASK1" / "CLIENT SIDE" LEGACY_JETSON_SIDE_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / "zed" / "TASK1" / "JETSON SIDE"
# Repository also contains a "Fetch Data" folder in some checkouts — prefer it # if present. Add a few common name variants as additional fallbacks. FETCH_DATA_1 = PROJECT_DIR / "Fetch Data" FETCH_DATA_2 = PROJECT_DIR / "fetch_data" FETCH_DATA_3 = PROJECT_DIR / "Fetch_Data"
def _prefer_existing(*paths: Path) -> Path: for path in paths: if path.exists(): return path return paths[0]
CLIENT_SIDE_DIR = _prefer_existing( CLIENT_SIDE_DIR, LEGACY_CLIENT_SIDE_DIR, FETCH_DATA_1, FETCH_DATA_2, FETCH_DATA_3, )
JETSON_SIDE_DIR = _prefer_existing( JETSON_SIDE_DIR, LEGACY_JETSON_SIDE_DIR, FETCH_DATA_1, FETCH_DATA_2, FETCH_DATA_3, )
def gui_file(*parts: str) -> Path: return GUI_DIR.joinpath(*parts)
def client_side_file(*parts: str) -> Path: return CLIENT_SIDE_DIR.joinpath(*parts)
def jetson_side_file(*parts: str) -> Path: return JETSON_SIDE_DIR.joinpath(*parts)
def load_module_from_path(module_name: str, path: Path) -> ModuleType: spec = util.spec_from_file_location(module_name, path) if spec is None or spec.loader is None: raise ImportError(f"Cannot load module {module_name!r} from {path}")
module = util.module_from_spec(spec) module_dir = str(path.parent) added = module_dir not in sys.path if added: sys.path.insert(0, module_dir) try: spec.loader.exec_module(module) finally: if added: try: sys.path.remove(module_dir) except ValueError: pass return module

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
"""Deprecated compatibility shim for older checkouts.
This project no longer relies on `app_paths.py`. The GUI and systems were refactored to load UI files and the `grap_video` helper without this helper module. The original file is preserved here as a small shim to avoid surprising import errors during incremental upgrades.
If you are certain no code in your environment imports `app_paths`, you can delete this file. Otherwise keep it as-is to preserve compatibility. """
import warnings
warnings.warn( "gui.app_paths is deprecated and no longer required; it can be removed.", DeprecationWarning, )
def _deprecated(*args, **kwargs): raise RuntimeError( "app_paths helper was removed. Update code to load UI files and client/jetson modules directly." )
# Minimal exported names to avoid ImportError in older code that still # references these symbols. They raise if used, directing developer to update # the call sites. GUI_DIR = None PROJECT_DIR = None CLIENT_SIDE_DIR = None JETSON_SIDE_DIR = None gui_file = _deprecated client_side_file = _deprecated jetson_side_file = _deprecated load_module_from_path = _deprecated

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
import threading import pyzed.sl as sl try: # when executed as package from zed.task1.jetson_side import video_server, data_server, data_writer except Exception: # fallback when run as a script from the directory import video_server import data_server import data_writer
def init_camera(): zed = sl.Camera() init = sl.InitParameters() init.depth_mode = sl.DEPTH_MODE.NEURAL init.coordinate_units = sl.UNIT.METER init.camera_resolution = sl.RESOLUTION.VGA init.camera_fps = 15 if zed.open(init) != sl.ERROR_CODE.SUCCESS: raise RuntimeError("ZED açılamadı") return zed
if __name__ == '__main__': zed = init_camera()
threading.Thread( target=video_server.start, args=(5000,), daemon=True ).start()
threading.Thread( target=data_server.start, args=(5001,), daemon=True ).start()
print("ZED başlatıldı") print("Video stream → http://0.0.0.0:5000/video_feed") print("Data stream → http://0.0.0.0:5001/data/stream")
try: data_writer.run(zed) except KeyboardInterrupt: print("Durduruluyor...") finally: zed.close() print("ZED kapatıldı")

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
import threading import pyzed.sl as sl from . import video_server, data_server, data_writer
def init_camera(): zed = sl.Camera() init = sl.InitParameters() init.depth_mode = sl.DEPTH_MODE.NEURAL init.coordinate_units = sl.UNIT.METER init.camera_resolution = sl.RESOLUTION.VGA init.camera_fps = 15 if zed.open(init) != sl.ERROR_CODE.SUCCESS: raise RuntimeError("ZED açılamadı") return zed
if __name__ == '__main__': zed = init_camera()
threading.Thread( target=video_server.start, args=(5000,), daemon=True ).start()
threading.Thread( target=data_server.start, args=(5001,), daemon=True ).start()
print("ZED başlatıldı") print("Video stream → http://0.0.0.0:5000/video_feed") print("Data stream → http://0.0.0.0:5001/data/stream")
try: data_writer.run(zed) except KeyboardInterrupt: print("Durduruluyor...") finally: zed.close() print("ZED kapatıldı")

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
